text: Being here, I find myself caught in a current of curiosity. The stark, flowing lines and vivid colors of the display ignite a sense of wonder within me. The idea of "R+D"—research and development—glimmers on the wall, inviting contemplation about the future and our relationship with machines. I feel both like an explorer and a witness, my mind brimming with questions about human innovation. The space urges me to think beyond the visible, to seek deeper meaning in technology and progress.
